content:
FINAL DEPLOYMENT SYNC BLOCK

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Goal:
Complete the last deployment gap and return COMPLETE with verified production evidence.

Current situation:
- GitHub latest commit exists.
- Production is still running an older commit.
- Render auto-deploy is configured but production has not yet updated.

TASK 1 — Deploy Latest Commit

Deploy the latest commit on main to the Render service.

Wait until deployment finishes.

Return:
- Render Deploy ID
- Deploy start time
- Deploy finish time
- Deploy status
- Deployed commit SHA

TASK 2 — Verify Commit Chain

Verify these three values:

1. GitHub latest SHA
2. Render deployed SHA
3. /health SHA

Return:

GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
MATCH:
YES or NO

TASK 3 — Verify Production

Verify:

✓ chat.ivxholding.com loads
✓ /health returns HTTP 200
✓ Public chat replies
✓ Owner chat works
✓ WhatsApp-style last conversation opens automatically
✓ Messages persist after refresh
✓ No "Couldn't read response"
✓ No "TypeError: Network request failed"

TASK 4 — Verify Auto-Deploy

Push one small verification commit.

Confirm:

- GitHub receives commit
- Render starts deployment automatically
- Render deploy completes
- Production SHA changes to the new commit

Return:

AUTO_DEPLOY:
PASS or FAIL

TASK 5 — Monitor Evidence

Update Monitor with live values:

- GitHub SHA
- Render Deploy ID
- Render deployed SHA
- Health SHA
- Commit Match
- Deployment timestamp
- Chat status
- Supabase status

TASK 6 — Final Report

Return only:

REPO:
BRANCH:
LATEST_GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY:
HEALTH_STATUS:
PUBLIC_CHAT_STATUS:
OWNER_CHAT_STATUS:
LAST_CONVERSATION_STATUS:
MESSAGE_PERSISTENCE_STATUS:
MONITOR_STATUS:
STREAM_STATUS:
LIVE_WORK_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:

FINAL_STATUS:

Rules:

COMPLETE only if:
- GitHub SHA = Render deployed SHA = /health SHA
- Render Deploy ID exists
- Auto-deploy works on a new commit
- Chat loads the last conversation automatically
- Message persistence passes
- Production is live

If any requirement fails, report the exact blocker with evidence instead of claiming COMPLETE.
